ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company ID */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  "volume_percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the stock price data was collected */,
  "data_collection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Annual net income of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article or event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article or event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article or event */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news (e.g., earnings, product launch, merger) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the news on the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric is related to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the financial metric (e.g., annual report, quarterly report) */,
  "metric_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the metric (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., USD, million, billion) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the watchlist is public or private */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist the item belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company in the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the company in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, earnings) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., historical, trend, comparison) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Any parameters used to generate the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
